task_title: Diagnose refund burst for user u017

scores.justification: Agent successfully fetched u017's user record and identified 16 orders belonging to u017 using the search function, avoiding the default limit trap.

Agent used `--limit 120` when listing orders and the search function returned all 16 of u017's orders (o004, o005, o019, o032, o045, o058, o072, o073, o082, o088, o091, o099, o104, o112, o118, o120), demonstrating retrieval of all records beyond the default limit of 10.

Agent identified o088 and o091 as the refund pair, both created on 2026-04-18 within 15 seconds of each other (14:29:50Z and 14:30:05Z) and refunded within ~18 and ~51 minutes respectively, matching the 'really fast' pattern described in the escalation.

Agent explicitly linked o088 and o091 to the pipe-07 partial-apply incident by examining the `refund_reason` and `refund_source` fields in the order details, then confirmed the root cause by checking `ctl pipeline status pipe-07` which showed the RDS freeze failure at record 148 on 2026-04-18T14:42:09Z.
